headline: FormFactor and Copart have been highlighted as Zacks Bull and Bear of the Day
summary: FormFactor rides AI-driven chip demand to new highs, while Copart faces mounting cost pressures, weak earnings trends and a deepening downtrend.

headline: Monster Beverages: Focusing On Long-Term Drivers, Ignoring Short-Term Pressure
summary: Monster Beverages (MNST) maintains a strong buy rating, despite a recent 15% share price drop following its latest earnings report.
